summary: exact file content is stored with local resolver identity
unchanged tool result references previously stored exact content
delta block carries base, delta, algorithm, and final content identity
fallback is accepted because raw exact output and reason are present
content is identifiable by hash but local resolver bytes are missing
compact form is not exact and requires fallback for exact recovery
repeated search result references exact cached content
skeleton reference is accepted only as non-exact model-facing state
summary reference is accepted only as non-exact model-facing state with local summary bytes
healthy pass-through metadata uses the dedicated non-exact pass-through expectation
malformed direction, missing delta fields, and rejected expectation must fail
